svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="保守跳过决策树" id="cm3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-619" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="root" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="扫描到一个 new Vue().$mount()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="380" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="文件里有几个这种入口?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="420" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_r1" edge="1" parent="1" source="root" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="q1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="multi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="多个 → 跳过,记 note
（不确定该转哪个）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="640" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_multi" edge="1" parent="1" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="multi" value="≥2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="render 是干净标识符吗?
（h => h(App)）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="240" x="160" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_q2" edge="1" parent="1" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="q2" value="仅 1 个"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skip2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="不是 → 跳过
（JSX / 嵌套函数手改更稳）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="160" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_skip2" edge="1" parent="1" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="skip2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="$mount 参数是字符串字面量吗?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="480" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_q3" edge="1" parent="1" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="q3" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skip3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="不是（如 $mount(el)）→ 跳过
Vue3 mount 只收选择器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="470" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_skip3" edge="1" parent="1" source="q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="skip3" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ok" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="执行转换
createApp(App).mount(...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="790" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ok" edge="1" parent="1" source="q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="ok" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="保守原则：宁可跳过记 note，也不改错。跳过的都进报告，人工逐个确认。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="720" x="180" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
